$comment: Code<->Figma contract for SPACING (PEA-219 hardening). Code uses Tailwind v4's default 4px-base spacing scale (--spacing: 0.25rem; gap-N / p-N / m-N / etc. = N × 0.25rem = N × 4px), with NO project override — tailwind.config.js intentionally removed the spacing override (see its comment). Figma's 'spacing' collection mirrors a curated subset of that scale as gap-N variables; a comma marks a half-step because Figma bans '.' in variable names (gap-1,5 ↔ code gap-1.5). check_spacing_drift.mjs asserts every captured Figma rung sits exactly on the 4px grid (px == N × 4) — i.e. Figma spacing == the code Tailwind scale, by construction. Tailwind generates any N on demand, so which rungs Figma exposes is a curated set, not exhaustive; this snapshot documents the captured set. Refresh via use_figma per CONVENTIONS.md §8.
